name: Jubilant FoodWorks Limited
summary: Jubilant FoodWorks Limited operates as a food service company. It develops and operates Domino's Pizza restaurants in India, Sri Lanka, and Bangladesh; and Dunkin' Donuts and Hong's Kitchen restaurants in India. The company operates 1,335 Domino's Pizza restaurants in 282 cities; 34 Dunkin' Donuts restaurants in 10 cities; and one Hong's Kitchen restaurant in India. It also sells its products online through mobile application. The company was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Noida, India.
